meta.full_script: Hey Orbital team! Big news today - your sessions exploded 2000%, which is incredible, but we've got a critical budget situation that needs immediate attention. The good news? Your brand search is crushing it at $22.28 CPA, way below target. Our creative team just delivered 8 new speed-focused ads that position you as the premium choice. The challenge? We're 97% over budget this month due to a technical glitch. I'm personally fixing this right now and will have an update in 2 hours. This growth shows your market fit is real - we just need to control the spend while we scale smartly.

meta.full_script: Hi! Quick update on your campaigns. The good news: your ads are converting efficiently at just $32 per acquisition - way below your $100 target. Revenue hit $30,858 with a healthy 1.85x return. Your Brand Search campaigns are absolutely crushing it with 155 conversions. However, we have a critical issue: you're 97% over your monthly budget at $19,777 spent. We need to implement budget caps immediately. Our Creative team just delivered 8 new ads focused on your speed advantage - think 'when Google takes days, we take hours.' Let's get on a call this week to fix the budget situation while keeping this strong performance momentum going.

message: Generated 8 creatives. Focus on speed as premium differentiator rather than cost advantage. Target time-conscious consumers willing to pay for velocity. Use competitor comparisons to establish market position while avoiding race-to-bottom pricing messaging.

meta.full_script: Hey there! This is your weekly Orbital update, and wow – what a week! Your campaigns are performing so well that we actually hit a 'good problem' – we exceeded budget because your ROAS jumped 37% to 1.77x! We're getting 37% more conversions at 25% lower cost per customer. Your Brand Search campaigns are absolutely crushing it with 2.5x return. Here's what our AI agents did: immediately paused the budget bleeders, launched 16 new speed-focused creatives, and protected your best performers. The challenge? We exceeded monthly budget by about 8K because everything's working so well. Next steps: let's discuss expanding that budget cap so we can fully capitalize on this incredible momentum. Your 'fast shipping' message is resonating perfectly – customers are converting like crazy!

Video Brief Script: Hi! Quick update on your orbital campaigns. The big news? We're seeing amazing growth - conversions up 29%, ROAS up 24%, and your cost per acquisition is beating target by over 8%. Your Brand Search c...

meta.full_script: Hi! Quick update on your orbital campaigns. The big news? We're seeing amazing growth - conversions up 29%, ROAS up 24%, and your cost per acquisition is beating target by over 8%. Your Brand Search campaign is the star performer with a 2.52x return and costs 51% below target. However, we did hit a budget challenge this month, spending 182% of our planned budget due to the strong performance. Don't worry - our AI team immediately implemented emergency controls, pausing underperforming summer campaigns and focusing spend on your winners. We've also created 8 new creative assets to refresh your Performance Max campaign and combat fatigue. The fundamentals of your account are incredibly strong, and we're restructuring the budget framework to support sustainable growth going forward. Bottom line: great results, lessons learned, and we're optimizing for even better performance next month!
